parameters.query:
SELECT webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $json.body.client_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Message Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Message Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Message Request').item.json.body.token, secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Receive Message Request').item.json.body.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT config
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.slug }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { must: [ { key: 'type', match: { value: 'chat_history' } }, { key: 'client_id', match: { value: $('Check Token Valid').item.json.client_id } }, { key: 'user_id', match: { value: $('Check Token Valid').item.json.target_user_id } }, { key: 'session_id', match: { value: $('Check Token Valid').item.json.session_id } } ] }, limit: 500, with_payload: true, with_vector: false }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ session_id: $('Build Messages List').item.json.session_id, messages: $('Build Messages List').item.json.messages }) }}
